hero.title: Latest from K9 Leisure Club
hero.intro: Tips, news, and stories from our team in Kidderminster.

posts.title: Why Hydrotherapy Could Change Your Dog's Life
posts.excerpt: Whether your dog is recovering from surgery, managing arthritis, or just loves to splash around, our hydrotherapy pool and underwater treadmill offer a low-impact workout tailored to them.

posts.title: Why Doggy Daycare Beats Staying Home Alone
posts.excerpt: Dogs are social animals. A day at K9 Leisure Club means supervised play, new friends, mental stimulation, and a tired, happy pup at the end of the day.

posts.title: The Full Groom Experience — What to Expect
posts.excerpt: From the initial brush-out to the final spritz, here is what happens during a full groom at K9 Leisure Club and why regular grooming is more than just looking good.

posts.title: Introducing Our Spa Packages
posts.excerpt: Treat your dog to something special. Our spa packages combine premium bathing, coat treatments, and finishing touches that leave your dog looking and feeling their best.

posts.title: Keeping Your Dog Entertained Indoors
posts.excerpt: Rainy days do not have to mean bored dogs. We share our favourite enrichment ideas and mental stimulation games you can do at home.

posts.title: Planning a Dog-Friendly Holiday
posts.excerpt: Travelling with your dog takes a bit of planning but the rewards are worth it. Here are our top tips for a smooth, stress-free trip with your four-legged travel companion.
